---
title: "Publications"
toc: true
---

A complete and automatically updated list of my publications can also be found on [iNSPIRE HEP](https://inspirehep.net/authors/3157664) and [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0001-8717-1712).

## Preprints & Working Papers

* **Signatures of loop quantum gravity in primordial black hole cosmologies**  
  Antoine Dierckx, Sébastien Clesse, Francesca Vidotto. (2026)  
  [[arXiv:XXXX.XXXXX]](#) | [[Code: pbh-rem]](https://github.com/adierckx/pbh-rem)

<!-- 
## Published Papers
*(Peer-reviewed articles will be listed here)*
-->

## Scientific Software & Repositories

* **[pbh-rem](https://github.com/adierckx/pbh-rem):** A Mathematica framework developed to compute phenomenological constraints on Primordial Black Holes with stable remnants (including LQG Planckian relics and macroscopic remnants from the memory burden effect).
